## Summary

Describe the change in one or two short paragraphs.

## Related Issues

Closes #

## What Changed

- [ ] New feature or functionality
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] GitHub workflow or automation change

## Validation

Describe how you verified the change.

- [ ] Ran `npm run dev` and tested locally
- [ ] Ran `npm run build` and verified build succeeds
- [ ] Ran `npm run lint` and all checks pass
- [ ] Checked TypeScript compilation
- [ ] Verified responsive design on different viewports

## TypeScript Compliance

- [ ] All new code has proper type definitions
- [ ] No `any` types without justification
- [ ] Exported functions have explicit return types

## Notes For Reviewers

Add context reviewers should know before approving.
